Official.linkContent: You can use ‘official’ {{ types }} in every product phase. They're fully accessible, and will be supported and maintained in the long term.

To be reviewed.link: How to use ‘to be reviewed’ {{ types }}
To be reviewed.linkContent: You can use ‘to be reviewed’ {{ types }} in every product phase. However, there may be issues with them, as they have not been reviewed or developed recently.

Experimental.linkContent: You can use ‘experimental’ {{ type }} in alpha and beta phases. They can also be used an idea or starting point for a design.

Archived.linkContent: Do not use ‘archived’ {{ type }}. They're no longer being supported.
